description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is primarily white and gray, featuring large rectangular windows and clean lines. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence and includes a driveway with a gate, a carport, and a landscaped yard with trees. A spacious backyard contains a freeform swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and shaded lounging spaces. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance facing the driveway and sliding glass doors opening to the backyard. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living and functional, uncluttered architecture.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, fenced yard, driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and a tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Backyard view highlighting the swimming pool, patio furniture, and sliding glass doors leading inside.
description_view_2: Side and rear view with the pool, shaded lounge area, and a large tree partially obscuring the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and a tree, with the pool area visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, no porch, and is accessed via a paved driveway with a metal gate.
